title: Agentic AI addendum to the AI technical standard for Australian Government
notes: Discovered during the scheduled manual review of the digital.gov.au AI policy hub.

analysis.summary: DTA addendum extending the Australian Government AI technical standard with secure and governed agentic-AI implementation guidance.

proposedRecord.title: Agentic AI addendum to the AI technical standard for Australian Government
proposedRecord.description: Australian Government best-practice standard for secure and governed implementation of agentic AI systems.
proposedRecord.content: The Agentic AI addendum provides best-practice guidance for Australian Government agencies exploring, developing or using agentic AI. It applies alongside the Australian Government AI technical standard and addresses agentic considerations across the AI lifecycle, including design, data, training, evaluation, integration, monitoring and decommissioning. The underlying technical-standard statements, criteria and general guidance continue to apply.
proposedRecord.aiSummary: DTA addendum extending the Australian Government AI technical standard with secure and governed agentic-AI implementation guidance.

The record is withheld pending fingerprinted re-verification.
